# Copilot Instructions

## Code Style Guidelines

### Emoji Usage
- **CRITICAL**: Do NOT add emojis to code, comments, documentation, or any generated content
- Do NOT use emojis in messages, responses, or any form of communication
- Keep all text professional and emoji-free
- This applies to all file types including markdown, code files, notebooks, configuration files, and conversational responses
- Use plain text alternatives instead (e.g., "SUCCESS:" instead of "✅", "ERROR:" instead of "❌", "User:" instead of "👤", "Agent:" instead of "🤖")
